commit_scope: Add Form-shell for/while loop parsing and pure executor semantics, prove the loop surface across Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu, and introduce a live-room Form-shell cell so the Android bedside carrier can express the per-turn decision path as Form-native shell: native test gate, native vd-route diarization, passthrough translation, and append redirect.

fourth_arm_outputs: shell-parse-band: validate.sh returned 255 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way', '1 ok, 0 divergent', including for-loop AST, while-loop AST, and echo-for reserved-word edge.
shell-exec-band: validate.sh returned 511 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way', '1 ok, 0 divergent', including for output a/b/c, terminating while fixed point, and empty-body for edge.
shell-cell-band: validate.sh returned 15 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way', '1 ok, 0 divergent'.

live-room-shell-band: validate.sh returned 63 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way', '1 ok, 0 divergent', proving native test, native vd-route, ollama passthrough, and append redirect in the live-room cell.
local_validation.notes: make wellness completed with existing non-blocking drift in registry/source-map readings. The loop recipes are pure list/integer Form semantics and crossed fkwu; no fkwu divergence was omitted. The live-room bash carrier remains the host pump for recording, whisper, ollama, and file append. The live capture silence gate now calls Form-shell sh-exit over native test, and the diarization path calls voice-diarize.fk vd-route through a source-compiled core prelude.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after push/PR. Local proof covers focused Form bands, fourth-arm fkwu agreement, and live-room carrier shell syntax.

deploy_validation.notes: This branch changes Form stdlib and an Android experiment carrier. Public deployment proof is pending PR merge and normal repository CI/deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local and fourth-arm proof passed; PR CI, merge, and any public deploy settlement remain pending.

evidence_refs: shell-grammar.fk documents loop AST layout and parses compound statements before command words so 'echo for' remains an argument case.
shell-exec.fk dispatches __while__ to a capped pure loop and __for__ to an env-threading iterator, both following sh-eval-seq's out/env/exit pattern.
shell-exec-band.fk proves for, while, and empty-body loop semantics with fkwu fourth-arm agreement.
live-room-shell.fk and live-room-shell-band.fk prove the live-room fsh cell carries native test and vd-route decisions, passthrough ollama translation, and append redirect.

experiments/coherence-sense-android/live-room.sh exposes --cell and --probe-form, routes the silence gate through Form-shell native test, and routes diarization through voice-diarize.fk's vd-route instead of Bash pitch bucketing.
form/fourth-arm-bands.txt registers updated shell-parse, shell-exec, and live-room-shell four-way rows.
worktree_pr_guard.py --mode local passed with ready_for_push=True and local_preflight=pass; check_pr_followthrough.py reported stale_codex_prs=0.

After PR creation, origin/main advanced and GitHub reported mergeStateStatus DIRTY. The final rebase conflict was limited to docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl; resolution preserved origin/main's new proof row and this task's proof row.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-shell can now parse and execute for/while loops as pure Form AST nodes across all four kernels, and the live-room Android carrier has a Form-shell cell for its per-turn decision path instead of Bash-only orchestration.
public_endpoints: none added; local Form stdlib and Android experiment carrier only
test_flows:
for-loop flow: sh-out of 'for w in a b c ; do echo $w ; done' returns 'a
b
c
' on Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu.
while-loop flow: sh-out of 'i=1 ; while test $i -le 3 ; do echo $i ; i=4 ; done' returns '1\n' and terminates before the loop guard.
empty body edge: sh-out of 'for x in a ; do ; done' returns an empty string on Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu.
live-room cell flow: the fsh cell plan contains native test, native vd-route, passthrough ollama-translate, and __append__ redirect.
live-room carrier flow: --probe-form returns voiced, silent, and Voz 1 for synthetic native gate and vd-route checks without touching mic, adb, phone, or sleep capture paths.
